diffs.diff:
--- a/test_inference.py
+++ b/test_inference.py
@@ -0,0 +1,106 @@
+import json, os, torch, numpy as np

+from PIL import Image

+from transformers import AutoProcessor, Qwen2_5_VLForConditionalGeneration

+

+MODEL_PATH = '/data/base_model/Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct'

+# load first sample from unified_val.jsonl for a real image and instruction

+val_path = '/data/unified_val.jsonl'

+with open(val_path, 'r') as f:

+    line = f.readline()

+    row = json.loads(line)

+

+image_path = os.path.join('/data', row['image_path'])

+instruction = row['instruction']

+print('Using image:', image_path, 'instruction:', instruction)

+print('Ground truth:', row.get('target_bbox', ''), row.get('target_point', ''))

+

+# load processor

+processor = AutoProcessor.from_pretrained(MODEL_PATH, trust_remote_code=True)

+# set min_pixels/max_pixels to cap memory (guideline)

+processor.image_processor.min_pixels = 256*28*28

+processor.image_processor.max_pixels = 1280*28*28

+

+# load model with sdpa

+model = Qwen2_5_VLForConditionalGeneration.from_pretrained(

+    MODEL_PATH,

+    torch_dtype=torch.bfloat16,

+    device_map='auto',

+    trust_remote_code=True,

+    attn_implementation='sdpa'

+)

+model.eval()

+

+# Prepare messages: just user prompt with image and instruction

+img = Image.open(image_path).convert('RGB')

+

+messages = [

+    {

+        "role": "user",

+        "content": [

+            {"type": "image", "image": img},

+            {"type": "text", "text": instruction}

+        ]

+    }

+]

+

+text_prompt = processor.apply_chat_template(messages, tokenize=False, add_generation_prompt=True)

+print('Chat template prompt:\n', text_prompt[:500])

+

+# tokenize with images

+inputs = processor(

+    text=[text_prompt],

+    images=[img],

+    return_tensors='pt',

+    padding=True,

+).to(model.device)

+

+print('Input keys:', inputs.keys())

+if 'pixel_values' in inputs:

+    print('pixel_values shape:', inputs.pixel_values.shape)

+if 'image_grid_thw' in inputs:

+    print('image_grid_thw:', inputs.image_grid_thw)

+

+# generate

+with torch.no_grad():

+    generated_ids = model.generate(

+        **inputs,

+        max_new_tokens=64,

+        do_sample=False,

+        temperature=0.0,

+        use_cache=True

+    )

+

+# decode only new tokens (skip input prompt)

+input_len = inputs.input_ids.shape[1]

+new_ids = generated_ids[0][input_len:]

+decoded = processor.decode(new_ids, skip_special_tokens=False)

+print('Generated (with special tokens):', decoded)

+

+# show raw token ids for coordinates analysis

+print('New token IDs:', new_ids.tolist())

+for tid in new_ids[:30]:

+    tok = processor.tokenizer.convert_ids_to_tokens(tid.item())

+    print(f'  id {tid}: {repr(tok)}')

+

+# try alternative: add system prompt to enforce format

+messages2 = [

+    {

+        "role": "system",

+        "content": [{"type": "text", "text": "You are a helpful assistant. When asked to locate an element in an image, output the coordinates in the format <|box_start|>(x1,y1),(x2,y2)<|box_end|> or <|box_start|>x1 y1 x2 y2<|box_end|>."}]

+    },

+    {

+        "role": "user",

+        "content": [

+            {"type": "image", "image": img},

+            {"type": "text", "text": instruction}

+        ]

+    }

+]

+text2 = processor.apply_chat_template(messages2, tokenize=False, add_generation_prompt=True)

+inputs2 = processor(text=[text2], images=[img], return_tensors='pt', padding=True).to(model.device)

+with torch.no_grad():

+    gen_ids2 = model.generate(**inputs2, max_new_tokens=64, do_sample=False)

+new_ids2 = gen_ids2[0][inputs2.input_ids.shape[1]:]

+decoded2 = processor.decode(new_ids2, skip_special_tokens=False)

+print('\nWith format instruction:')

+print(decoded2)
